features: 4-WAY EXTENSION LEAD - This 4-way UK plug extension lead is suitable for all UK power adapters. The extension lead is ideal for using within your home, office spaces, or even outside in your garden if you need the power.
1 METRE LONG - This extension lead features a 1-metre cable, which provides a longer reach for your powered devices. The 4 connection sockets each provide 13A of power.
IDEAL FOR 4 DEVICES – This extension cable is a necessity when you have multiple appliances that you need power for, and is perfect for those rooms where in-built power sockets are lacking.

LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN - The slim, compact and lightweight design allows you transport your extension cord around the house or office with ease while also being able to place it behind your desk or on the floor so it saves space and doesn't get in the way.
BENROSS – Benross manufactures a multitude of electrical appliances. From extension cords and adapters, to heaters and coolers for the home, you can find it all at the Benross store on Amazon.
description: Product Description Benross 4-Way Extension Leads Power & Space Saving Solution Make space for extra devices any time you need them with these handy extension leads! With each featuring 4 plug sockets, they're perfect for powering multiple appliances in busy rooms. Choose from five different options for cable length - 1 metre, 2 metres, 3 metres, 5 metres, and 10 metres. Each of these lengths can provide ample space to plug in your devices away from a mains socket. The extensions' compact design makes them perfect for use all around the home, as well as in an office, being perfect for locations such as underneath a desk. KEY FEATURES UK Plug Sockets (Type G) 13 Amps Compact Design 1m, 2m, 3m, 5m, or 10m Cable Options 25cm x 2.5cm x 5.5cm Socket Size VARIOUS USES Thanks to the varying cable lengths on these extensions, they can be useful in many different places, such as living rooms, bedrooms, offices, workshops, garages and more. UK PLUG SOCKETS These multi-socket extensions are designed for use with Type G plugs, more widely known as the UK plug type, with three triangle-shaped prongs. SPACE SAVING The extension cables are sleek and slim in their design, so you won't have to worry about them taking up a lot of space that could be used for appliances or decorations. 10-Way Extension Lead Tower 16-Inch Standing Fan 5m Extension Lead Cable 2000W Industrial Fan Heater Slimline Corded Telephone Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 204 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,504 4.4 out of 5 stars 132 3.9 out of 5 stars 1,214 4.0 out of 5 stars 595 Price £22.99 £ 22 . 99 — no data £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £32.99 £ 32 . 99 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 OTHER BENROSS ELECTRICAL PRODUCTS ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
